Off Calendar Mar-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions IS GRANTED.
